steps.t: Caras Tilion can be found to the south of Felegoth in Eryn Lasgalen. Unable to remember anything after encountering Karazgar, Thranduil has asked you …
The trail of rust leads deeper into Caras Tilion. You should follow the trail of rust into Caras Tilion and attempt to learn what has transpired.
